error_signature: Response Mode in the chat trigger node must be set to Respond Nodes
title: Chat trigger node requires Response Mode adjustment
symptom: The user encounters an error stating that the 'Response Mode' must be set to 'Respond Nodes', but cannot find the field to adjust it.
not_this_if: The error does not occur in other nodes
The user is not using the chat trigger node
root_cause: The chat trigger node has a field labeled 'Using Response Nodes' instead of 'Response Mode'. This can cause confusion for users who are looking for the exact phrasing in the error message.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the chat trigger node
Locate the field labeled 'Using Response Nodes'
Set it to the appropriate value
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Adjust the 'Using Response Nodes' setting in the chat trigger node to resolve the error.
